case_title: KONSTANTIN RADINOVICH VS. RUSSART AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANTARIAN AIR TO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KONSTANTIN RADINOVICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUSSART AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANTARIAN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANNA ROYAK, MANAGER ISABELLA GRIBANOWSKI VP. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUSSART AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANTARIAN AIR TO RUSSIA  AND CIS PLAINTIFF ADMITS THAT DEFENDANT PERFORMED SOME SERVICES INCLUDING FILLING OUT HIS PAPERWORK AND INFORMING HIM OF CONSULAR SERVICES' VISITS. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVED THAT HIS WAIT AT THE TEMPORARY CONSULATE WAS A RESULT OF DEFENDANT'S NEGLIGENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,505.00 FILED BY RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSART AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANTARIAN AIR TO RUSSIA  AND CIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-03-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT RUSSART AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANTARIAN AIR TO RUSSIA  AND CIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT RUSSART AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANTARIAN AIR TO RUSSIA  AND CIS
